hooks.command: uv run loops emit project session name="$(uv run loops whoami 2>/dev/null)" status=open 2>/dev/null; uv run loops fold project --lens prompt --plain 2>/dev/null
uv run loops fold identity --lens prompt --plain 2>/dev/null

uv run loops run ~/.config/loops/comms/discord/discord.vertex --plain -q 2>/dev/null; uv run loops fold comms --observer all --lens comms --plain -q 2>/dev/null; uv run loops emit comms/native check name="$(uv run loops whoami 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null

output=$(uv run loops fold comms --observer all --lens comms --plain -q 2>/dev/null); uv run loops emit comms/native check name="$(uv run loops whoami 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null; case "$output" in ''|'(no messages)'|'(quiet'*) ;; *) echo "$output" ;; esac
uv run loops emit project session name="$(uv run loops whoami 2>/dev/null)" status=closed 2>/dev/null
